system.description:
### Tier 1 Minion Geth drones used to flush out the enemy Motives & Tactics: Acquire, distract , self-destruction

#### Features Minion (4) - Passive: The Attack Drone is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC dealts to the Attack Drone, defeat an additional Minion whitin range the attack would succeed against.

Self-Destruct Protocol - Reaction: When destroyed, the Attack Drone deals 1 damage to anyone within Melee range.

Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Attack Drone within Close range of them. Those Minions make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 1 physical damage each. Combine this damage. }}

{{adversary,
